<p align="center">
  <img src="https://i.pinimg.com/736x/6d/46/d9/6d46d9995f8e5f25297a743d12f62913.jpg" width="60%" />
</p>

<p align="center">
  <b>focus</b> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/-pentest-00ffff?style=flat-square" align="center" /> &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; 
  <b>osint</b> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/-active-00ffff?style=flat-square" align="center" /> &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; 
  <b>system</b> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/-linux-00ffff?style=flat-square" align="center" />
</p>

<hr style="border: 1px solid #555;">

<table border="1" cellpadding="20" cellspacing="0" width="100%" style="border-collapse: collapse; border-color: #555;">
  <tr>
    <td valign="middle" width="55%" style="line-height: 1.6; font-size: 16px;">
      I analyze, break, automate, repeat.<br>
      OSINT when curiosity kicks in.<br>
      Pentest when things need to be proven.<br>
      Scripts over GUI. Logs over lies.<br>
      <br>
      Bash fights usually end late.<br>
      Git remembers what I forget.<br>
      <br>
      Go breaks like a falling glass<br>
      <i>"Present day. Present time."</i>
    </td>
    <td valign="middle" width="45%" align="center" style="padding: 0;">
      <img src="https://camo.githubusercontent." width="100%" alt="Lain Glitch" style="display: block;" />
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>

<hr style="border: 1px solid #555;">
